meaning: vt.防护,辩护,防卫,[律]作...的辩护律师
examples: He has hired a lawyer to defend him against the allegation.
The newspaper continues to defend its publication of the photographs.
How can you defend such behaviour?
"We have to defend the principle of universality and universal access, " he told BBC News.
ThinkFire helps clients like Cisco Systems and NEC enforce and defend their intellectual property.
